arabic: يَمْتَازُ المَطْبَخُ العَرَبِيُّ بِتَنَوُّعِ الأَطْبَاقِ وَلَذَّتِهَا. يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ تَنَاوُلَ الكَبْسَةِ فِي الخَلِيجِ وَالكُسْكُسِي فِي المَغْرِبِ. تُسْتَخْدَمُ التَّوَابِلُ المُلَوَّنَةُ لِإِعْطَاءِ الطَّعَامِ نَكْهَةً خَاصَّةً. تَجْتَمِعُ العَائِلَةُ حَوْلَ المَائِدَةِ فِي وَقْتِ الغَدَاءِ. هَذِهِ اللَّحَظَاتُ تُقَوِّي العَلَاقَاتِ بَيْنَ الأَقَارِبِ.
translation: Arapska kuhinja se odlikuje raznolikošću i ukusnošću jela. Ljudi vole jesti kabsu u Zaljevu i kuskus u Magrebu. Šareni začini se koriste kako bi hrani dali poseban ukus. Porodica se okuplja oko stola u vrijeme ručka. Ovi trenuci jačaju veze među rođacima.
translationEn: Arab cuisine is characterized by a variety of delicious dishes. People love eating kabsa in the Gulf and couscous in the Maghreb. Colorful spices are used to give the food a special flavor. The family gathers around the table at lunchtime. These moments strengthen the relationships between relatives.
